name: Tix
description: A Ticket, also known as Tix for short, was a former Roblox currency alongside Robux, introduced on August 2, 2007.

name: Guests
description: Guests were a feature which allowed unregistered players to test the Roblox platform without a formal account.

name: Guilded
description: Guilded was a VoIP, instant messaging and digital distribution platform developed by Guilded Inc. and owned by Roblox Corporation.

name: Forums
description: The Roblox Forums were used for discussing and socializing with other people in a text-based format. The forums housed different subforums that each had their purposes.

name: Builders Club
description: Builders Club (BC) was Roblox's original paid membership, split into three tiers (BC, Turbo BC, and Outrageous BC), granting users a daily Robux bonus, extra place slots, the ability to sell clothing, and other exclusive perks.

name: Roblox Premium
description: Roblox Premium was the paid membership successor to Builders Club, offering a monthly Robux stipend, item trading, and a 10% Robux purchase bonus. It was announced as discontinued on April 10, 2026, to be replaced by Roblox Plus.

name: Build Mode
description: Build Mode was an in-game feature that allowed players to place and manipulate bricks directly inside a live game session. It was quietly removed in late December 2016 without a formal announcement.

name: Safe Chat
description: Safe Chat was a restricted chat mode used by under-13 users and guests that limited messages to a predefined whitelist of phrases. It was replaced by a new content filtering system in 2013.

name: My Sets
description: My Sets was a feature on the Roblox website and in Roblox Studio that let players organize and save collections of models and assets. It was removed on October 15, 2018.

name: User Advertisements
description: User Advertisements allowed players to purchase ad space on the Roblox website to promote their games, groups, and clothing items. They were removed on June 17, 2024.

name: PointsService
description: PointsService was a Roblox API service that allowed game developers to award players points for completing in-game tasks, which were displayed on per-game leaderboards. It was deprecated and removed on June 30, 2023.

name: Personal Servers
description: Personal Servers were private game instances available exclusively to Builders Club members, allowing them to play in a server only accessible to people they invited.

name: Facebook Connect
description: Facebook Connect was a feature that allowed Roblox users to link their Roblox account to their Facebook profile, enabling social sharing and friend discovery via Facebook.

name: Engagement-Based Payouts
description: Engagement-Based Payouts (EBP) was a system that automatically rewarded game developers with Robux based on the time Premium subscribers spent in their games. It was sunset in 2024 in favor of other monetization tools.
